data.name: Upload Subtitle
data.value: Pick any file and we'll generate a shareable link for you.

data.name: UA S1 Text
data.value: Welcome to {0}, a file-sharing service that lets you upload and share files quickly and securely. This User Agreement governs your use of the service. By creating an account or uploading files, you agree to the terms described in this document. Please read it carefully — it outlines your rights, your responsibilities, and how we handle your data.

data.name: UA S2 Text
data.value: By registering an account or uploading files you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this agreement. If you do not agree, you must not use the service. You must be at least 18 years old, or have permission from a parent or guardian, to use {0}.

data.name: UA S3 Text
data.value: You may use {0} to upload and share files for personal, lawful purposes. You are responsible for ensuring that any files you upload are either your own or that you have the necessary rights to share them. You agree not to misuse the service in any way that could damage, overload, or impair its availability for other users.

data.name: UA S4 Intro
data.value: You may not upload, share, or distribute any content that violates applicable law or is intended to harm any individual or group. This includes, but is not limited to:

data.name: UA S4 Item 1
data.value: Content that is illegal under local, national, or international law.

data.name: UA S4 Item 2
data.value: Material that harasses, threatens, or incites violence against any person or group.

data.name: UA S4 Item 3
data.value: Content that infringes on the intellectual property rights of others.

data.name: UA S4 Item 4
data.value: Malware, viruses, or any software designed to damage or disrupt systems.

data.name: UA S4 Item 5
data.value: Content that exploits or endangers minors in any way.

data.name: UA S4 Outro
data.value: We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these restrictions and to suspend or terminate accounts responsible for such uploads.

data.name: UA S5 Text 1
data.value: Uploaded files are retained for 30 days from the date of upload. After this period, the file content is permanently deleted and can no longer be downloaded. The associated metadata (such as file name and upload date) is kept for up to 365 days before it is also permanently removed.

data.name: UA S5 Text 2
data.value: We do not guarantee the availability of files beyond the 30-day retention window. Make sure to download or share your files before they expire.

data.name: UA S6 Intro
data.value: Your privacy matters to us. The content of your files and all associated metadata are kept strictly private and are never shared with third parties.

data.name: UA S6 Item 1
data.value: We do not sell, share, or transfer your data to advertising companies.

data.name: UA S6 Item 2
data.value: Your files and metadata are never used to train AI models or shared with AI companies.

data.name: UA S6 Item 3
data.value: File content is only accessible via the unique share link you choose to distribute.

data.name: UA S6 Item 4
data.value: For security purposes, we log the IP address associated with file uploads and other account actions. This data is stored securely and is subject to the same privacy protections described above.

data.name: UA S6 Outro
data.value: The only exception to the above is when we are legally required to act otherwise. If authorities present a valid court order, we will comply and provide the requested information to the extent required by law.

data.name: UA S7 Text
data.value: {0} is provided on an "as-is" basis without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the service or the permanent retention of uploaded files. We are not liable for any loss of data, loss of files due to expiry or deletion, or any damages arising from the use or inability to use the service. You are solely responsible for any files you upload and share, and for ensuring that recipients use them appropriately.

data.name: UA S8 Text 1
data.value: We may update this agreement from time to time. Any changes take effect from the date they are published and apply only to files uploaded after that date — files already uploaded remain subject to the terms that were in place at the time of upload.

data.name: UA S8 Text 2
data.value: When this agreement changes, you will be notified by email at the address associated with your account. We encourage you to review any updates carefully. Continued use of the service after notification constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

data.name: UA S9 Text Before
data.value: If you have any questions or concerns about this agreement, please contact us at:

data.name: Home Beta Message
data.value: This service is still in beta. New accounts require manual approval by an administrator before you can upload files.

data.name: Home Hero Lead
data.value: Upload once, share everywhere. Send files to friends and family in seconds — no account required on their end, no hassle, no limits.

data.name: Home Features Subtitle
data.value: Designed to get files from you to your friends as effortlessly as possible.

data.name: Home Feature 1 Text
data.value: Drop in any file and it's uploaded in seconds. Photos, videos, documents — {0} handles them all without breaking a sweat.

data.name: Home Feature 2 Text
data.value: Get a unique link the moment your file is uploaded. Send it over chat, email, or a text — your friends can download instantly.

data.name: Home Feature 3 Text
data.value: Your files live in the cloud, safely stored and ready whenever your friends need them — no app installs, no sign-up barriers.

data.name: Home How It Works Subtitle
data.value: Three steps. That's all it takes.

data.name: Home Step 1 Text
data.value: Pick any file from your device and upload it with a single click.

data.name: Home Step 2 Text
data.value: {0} instantly generates a unique, shareable link just for you.

data.name: Home Step 3 Text
data.value: Paste the link anywhere — your friends can download straight away.

data.name: Home CTA Text
data.value: Start using {0} to share files with the people who matter most.

data.name: Download Expired Message
data.value: This file has expired and is no longer available for download.

data.name: Download No Content Message
data.value: This file has no content and is not available for download.

data.name: Download Password Placeholder
data.value: Leave empty if no password was set

data.name: MyAssets Subtitle
data.value: An overview of all files you have uploaded.

data.name: MyAssets Empty
data.value: You have not uploaded any files yet.

data.name: Contact Subtitle
data.value: Have a question or feedback? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.

data.name: Contact Success
data.value: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.

data.name: Contact Login Required
data.value: You need to be logged in to send a message.

data.name: Contact Email Invalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.
